summary: The footage captures a snowy roadside scene where a vehicle drives along a narrow road flanked by snowbanks. A white truck overtakes the vehicle from the right side, passing closely alongside it.

events_timeline.event: A white truck overtakes the van from the right side, passing closely alongside it.

uncertainties: The identity of the van is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions.
